nasb.text: The magicians tried with their secret arts to bring forth gnats, but they could not; so there were gnats on man and beast.

esv.text: The magicians tried by their secret arts to produce gnats, but they could not. So there were gnats on man and beast.

cnv.text: 眾術士也用他們的巫術照樣行，要生出虱子來，卻不能辦到；所以在人身上和牲畜身上都有虱子。

ccb.text: 巫师们也试图用邪术变出虱子来，却无法成功。埃及的百姓和牲畜身上长满了虱子。
